OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Fetches assessment responses for an individual application and sends the data to appropriate DataMappers to upsert records.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: UpsertRecordsForIndividualApplication

omniProcessElements.name: FetchAssessmentResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "DiscoveryFrmwrk.PreFillAssessment", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "RemoteActionAssessmentId", "sendJSONPath" : "PSSFetchAssessmentId:RemoteActionAssessmentId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: IPCreatePartyExpense
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "GenericData" : "=%PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData%", "IACreatedAt" : "=%PSSFetchApplicationSubmissionDate:IACreationDate%", "PartyId" : "=%HeadOfHouseholdAccount:Account%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "disableChainable" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "integrationProcedureKey" : "BenefitManagement_CreatePartyExpenses", "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction2", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: FetchHouseholdIncomeMemberName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AssessmentId" : "=%PSSFetchAssessmentId:RemoteActionAssessmentId%", "Name" : "IncomeHouseholdMember", "Offset" : "=%SetMemberDetails:IncomeHouseholdMemberNameIndex%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchMemberNameFromHouseholdIncomeResponse1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction7", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertContactProfile

childElements.name: PSSUpsertPersonDisability
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:AccountId%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%", "StartDate" : "%PSSFetchApplicationSubmissionDate:IACreationDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPersonDisability1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "(PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:IsDisabled==\"Yes\") &&\n(PSSFetchPersonDisability:PersonDisablity==\"null\")", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "BenefitEligibilityStatus" : "%BenefitEligibilityStatus%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%", "PhoneNumber" : "%PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HeadOfHouseholdPhoneNumber%", "RecordId" : "%RecordId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "AccountId" : "%PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant:Account_1:Id%" }, "bundle" : "PSSUpsertPublicApplicationParticipant1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: UpdateBirthDateForHeadOfHousehold
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%PSSFetchIndividualApplicationStatus:AccountId%", "Birthdate" : "=%PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:DateOfBirth%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSCOCExpUpdateBirthDates1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails:Relationship==\"Self\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction5", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
